ValidationRule.description: Completed logs are immutable. Once Action_Type = MERGE_COMPLETED, no field can be edited manually. This preserves the forensic integrity of the audit trail.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISPICKVAL(Action_Type__c, 'MERGE_COMPLETED'), OR( ISCHANGED(Before_Snapshot_JSON__c), ISCHANGED(After_Snapshot_JSON__c), ISCHANGED(Master_Record_Id__c), ISCHANGED(Losing_Record_Ids__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Completed merge logs are read-only. The before/after snapshots and record IDs cannot be modified after the merge completes.
